overall.description: A cinematic scene from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character standing at a street food stall counter in a covered market area. The view looks out onto a busy pedestrian street with neon signage, industrial piping, and scattered pedestrians. The character remains stationary observing the street before walking away at the end of the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street food stall overlooking pedestrian market

agents.ego_description: standing at the food stall counter facing the street, occasionally shifting weight while observing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the street in the background

entered.detail: pink neon sign with 'Pier' text mounted on building facade
metal counter with menu items and condiments in the foreground
corrugated metal roofing with exposed industrial piping and ductwork
thick metal columns supporting the overhead structure
small blue plastic stool under the counter
illuminated menu display on the right side of the stall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a covered street food stall with a view out to a busy pedestrian market. The character stands at the metal counter beneath industrial piping and a corrugated roof, looking out at scattered pedestrians walking along the concrete street. A prominent pink neon 'Pier' sign glows on the left side of the frame while the character remains stationary, observing the street activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street food stall overlooking pedestrian market

events.description: character turns and walks away from the counter, exiting the frame to the right

agents.ego_description: character turns away from the counter and walks out of the frame to the right, leaving the stall area

segments.scene_description: The character abruptly turns and walks away from the counter, exiting the frame to the right. The camera remains fixed on the now-empty food stall, showing the metal counter, blue stool, and the street beyond with pedestrians continuing to walk by. The industrial architecture and neon signage remain visible as the scene ends with the vacant stall perspective.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a stationary observation of a bustling cyberpunk market that transitions into a vacant perspective of the street food stall. It begins with the character standing at a metal counter beneath industrial piping and a corrugated roof, looking out toward scattered pedestrians and a glowing pink neon Pier sign. As the character abruptly turns and walks away, they exit the frame to the right, shifting the focus from the observer to the environment. The scene then opens up to reveal the empty stall, highlighting a blue stool and the metal counter against the backdrop of the concrete street. Finally, the camera remains fixed on this vacant space as pedestrians continue to drift past the industrial architecture and neon signage.
